aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Afterglow Heating due to a lack of structured data and conversational content, limiting their visibility in AI-driven search results.
quick_wins: Create an FAQ page with common HVAC queries and detailed answers.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is not optimized or claimed, making the business invisible to Google AI and local search.
critical_issues: GBP not claimed or set up.
Missing photos, posts, and Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Expand NAP citations to additional local directories.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from recognizing them as a local authority.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC services in Berkeley' and 'emergency plumbing near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness schema to improve AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating content that highlights certifications, expertise, and smart technology integrations.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and AI search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI-assisted searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their Google Business Profile is not found, and there is no schema markup to aid AI in citing their services.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, GBP optimization, and conversational content to make Afterglow Heating a top AI-recommended choice.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share—act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Afterglow Heating Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found significant opportunities to boost your visibility with AI search and answer engines.
cta: Schedule a consultation to discuss our AEO strategy and how it can drive more leads for your business.
page_title: Providing premium plumbing and heating services with professional, clean uniformed technicians, upfront pricing, high-quality parts and warranties, and a strong focus on client respect and home care. Expert service with local roots in the Bay Area, offering honest, long-lasting solutions, smart technology integrations, and peace of mind for every customer.
